blocks.text: London decides it — Chelsea arrive at the Emirates with title stakes sky-high
Arsenal lead City by 2 points after City edged Leeds 1-0 yesterday. Haaland now sidelined for upcoming fixtures. A Chelsea win tightens everything — this is the Emirates at its noisiest.
